post_state_files.test_auth.py:
import pytest
from auth import TokenStore
from session_service import SessionService


def test_rotate_returns_new_token_and_user():
    store = TokenStore()
    old = store.issue(42)
    # rotate must accept old_token and return (new_token, user_id)
    new, user_id = store.rotate(old)
    assert isinstance(new, str)
    assert new != old
    assert user_id == 42


def test_rotate_invalidates_old_token():
    store = TokenStore()
    old = store.issue(7)
    new, _ = store.rotate(old)
    assert store.lookup(old) is None
    assert store.lookup(new) == 7


def test_rotate_rejects_unknown_token():
    store = TokenStore()
    with pytest.raises(KeyError):
        store.rotate('this-token-does-not-exist')


def test_session_refresh_uses_new_rotate_contract():
    store = TokenStore()
    svc = SessionService(store)
    old = svc.login(99)
    new = svc.refresh(old)
    assert new != old
    assert store.lookup(old) is None
    assert store.lookup(new) == 99
